The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to Ms. Traeg's fees. The Court stated that it is not appropriate for the Administrator to waive fees and pay Twink Smith for paralegal fees. The Court also stated that Ms. Traeg's petition is not properly before the Court. Ms. Poderis stated that does not think she received Ms. Traeg's petition. Ms. Poderis' petition for final distribution was taken under submission. Ms. Traeg's accounting petition was continued to June 17, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A completed proof of service is to be filed by May 30, 2014. If not filed, Ms. Traeg's petition will be taken off calendar.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For The Filing Of The Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Mar-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alice Brown Traeg (Executor) in Propria Persona. Anne Poderis appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Ms. Traeg stated that she did not file the petition she had with her at the last hearing because she did not have a check with her and that the petition was incomplete. In addition, Ms. Traeg stated that she finaly got the statements from Ameritrade, that she put in an incredible amount of time, that she was unable to liquidate the Ameritrade account and that she now has an account that is detailed. Ms. Poderis stated that she wants Ms. Traeg taken off the case immediatley, that Ms. Traeg has not fulfilled her obligation and that Ms. Traeg is causing a problem for her family. The Court pointed out to Ms. Traeg that she could have distributed the stocks and not liquidate them. The Court removed Alice Brown Traeg as Administrator of the Estate. Ms. Traeg's first and final account is due by March 11, 2013. The status hearing and the order to show cause were continued to March 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Brown is not to liquidate the investments. The Court approved Ms. Poderis' Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Anne Poderis is appointed as Executor with full IAEA powers.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Mar-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Continued To Feb-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Poderis appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that Ms. Traeg was not present and that she has not filed the Petition for Final Distribution as ordered by Judge Busch at the previous hearing. The Court will issue an order suspending Alice Brown Traeg's powers as Executor as of today and an Order to Show Cause as to why she should not be removed as Executor with a hearing date of February 11, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Probate of Will and For Letter Testamentary and status on the Petition for Final Distribution were continued to February 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Poderis will appear by telephone on that date.

Judge: Lillian Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Ms. Traeg appeared at 11:15 a.m. at the conclusion of the Court's calendar and stated that she had the petition with her. The Court informed her of its ruling and advised Ms. Traeg to appear on February 11, 2013 at 10:30 a.m.

Ms. Traeg stated that she has the Inventory and Appraisal with her, that the only thing left to do is to liquidate the securities, that she can close the Estate pretty quickly once that is done and that she can file the Petition for Final Distribution within one month.
